title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected

title_uk: Київ: виявлено пуск балістичної ракети
description: 'A missile reaches Kyiv in 2-4 minutes' — official explains air alarm lag during Russian ballistic strikes. "All information about launches or launch preparations comes to us from our partners. ... No system can be perfect, so failures do occur, and the alert may be delayed," Defense Ministry Advisor Serhii Beskrestnov said.

description: Russia left key military facilities in the Far North without anti-aircraft defense. This happened against the background of an intensifying campaign of attacks by our guys. "Radio Svoboda" publishes satellite images, which show that the systems were removed from several strategic objects that were previously under the protection of S-300 and S-400. The photos from July 6 show that the Rogachevo Air Base is on Novaya Zemlya...
description_en: Russia left key military facilities in the Far North without anti-aircraft defense. This happened against the background of an intensifying campaign of attacks by our guys. The photos from July 6 show that the Rogachevo Air Base is on Novaya Zemlya...
description_uk: россия оставила ключевые военные объекты на Крайнем Севере без средств противовоздушной обороны. Это произошло на фоне усиливающейся кампании атак наших ребят. "Радио Свобода" публикует спутниковые снимки, на которых видно, что системы были сняты с нескольких стратегических объектов, ранее находившихся под охраной С-300 и С-400. description: As pressure on Crimea heats up, Sea of Azov enters Ukraine’s crosshairs Over the past nine days, Ukraine has launched a sustained drone campaign against Russian shipping in the Sea of Azov, opening a new front in its effort to “isolate Crimea” and disrupt Moscow’s military logistics and export routes. Photo: YouTube / Robert “Madyar” Brovdi.

description: Flirting with AI bots is also treason. Scientists from Canada conducted a survey among 1,815 Canadian adults. Respondents were asked if their partner would become a traitor if he had open correspondence with AI. Three quarters of people admitted that the situation would definitely lead to a conflict. At the same time, about half would call such behavior treason. According to scientists, people are attracted by the reliability of AI - communicate with...
description_en: Flirting with AI bots is also treason. Scientists from Canada conducted a survey among 1,815 Canadian adults. Respondents were asked if their partner would become a traitor if he had open correspondence with AI. Three quarters of people admitted that the situation would definitely lead to a conflict. At the same time, about half would call such behavior treason. According to scientists, people are attracted by the reliability of AI - communicate with...
description_uk: Флиртовать с ИИ-ботами - это тоже измена Учёные из Канады провели опрос среди 1815 взрослых канадцев. Респондентов спросили, стал бы их партнёр изменником, если бы вёл откровенные переписки с ИИ. Три четверти людей признались, что ситуация бы точно привела к конфликту. При этом около половины назвали бы такое поведение изменой. По мнению учёных, людей привлекает безотказность ИИ - общаться с...

description: Head of Ukraine’s state-run defense giant steps down. The news follows a major controversy at Ukroboronprom, centered around a deadly explosion at one of its ammunition depots during a Russian attack on the Kyiv suburb of Vyshneve on July 6.

title: Donetsk: 7 missiles intercepted
title_en: Donetsk: 7 missiles intercepted
title_uk: Донецьк: перехоплено 7 ракет
description: 7 MISSILES AND 108 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of July 14 (from 6:00 p.m. on July 13), the enemy attacked with 8 Iskander-M/S-400 ballistic missiles from the Bryna region, 2 Kh-59/69 guided air missiles (launching area - air space of TOT AR Crimea) and 135 strike UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, Banderol barrage ammunition and simulator drones...
description_en: 7 MISSILES AND 108 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of July 14 (from 6:00 p.m. on July 13), the enemy attacked with 8 Iskander-M/S-400 ballistic missiles from the Bryna region, 2 Kh-59/69 guided air missiles (launching area - air space of TOT AR Crimea) and 135 strike UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, Banderol barrage ammunition and simulator drones...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 7 РАКЕТ ТА 108 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 14 липня (з 18:00 13 липня) противник атакував 8 балістичними ракетами Іскандер-М/С-400 із Бринської області, 2 керованими авіаційними ракетами Х-59/69 (район пуску – повітряний простір ТОТ АР Крим) та 135 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас, баражуючими боєприпасами "Бандероль" та дронами-імітаторами...

title: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine,...
title_en: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine,...
title_uk: 🇳 Міністр Андрій Сибіга: «Разом з першою леді України...
description: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine, Olena Zelenska, we held a fruitful meeting with UNESCO Director General Khaled El-Enani. We discussed expanding cooperation to protect education, culture, science, and freedom of expression in the face of ongoing Russian aggression." The minister expressed his gratitude to UNESCO for the initiatives to support and preserve the common cultural heritage....
description_en: 🇳 Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Together with the First Lady of Ukraine, Olena Zelenska, we held a fruitful meeting with UNESCO Director General Khaled El-Enani. We discussed expanding cooperation to protect education, culture, science, and freedom of expression in the face of ongoing Russian aggression." The minister expressed his gratitude to UNESCO for the initiatives to support and preserve the common cultural heritage....
description_uk: 🇳 Міністр Андрій Сибіга: "Разом із Першою леді України Оленою Зеленською провели плідну зустріч із генеральним директором ЮНЕСКО Халедом Ель-Енані. Ми обговорили розширення співпраці задля захисту освіти, культури, науки та свободи вираження поглядів в умовах триваючої російської агресії". Міністр висловив вдячність ЮНЕСКО за ініціативи з підтримки та збереження спільної культурної спадщини....
